flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Crowder College rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $8.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Crowder College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (31.8% → 24.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Crowder College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
